name: Debashish Bordoloi
about: Entry-level engineer with strong foundation in system analysis, networking basics, and technical deployment workflows.
Experienced in testing, troubleshooting, and coordinating technical tasks through hands-on work in security research and full-stack development.
Seeking to contribute to enterprise service delivery, installation, and network operations in a field-driven environment.

skills.Networking & Systems: Basic Networking, HTTP Protocol Analysis, Linux CLI, System Monitoring
skills.Deployment & Testing: Application Testing, Debugging, System Validation, Vulnerability Assessment
skills.Security: OWASP Top 10, IDOR, XSS, SSRF, CSRF, Reconnaissance
skills.Development: MERN Stack, REST APIs, Backend Systems
skills.Other: Team Coordination, Technical Documentation, AI-assisted Development

highlights.text: Full Stack Developer at CNCF Guwahati
OWASP Chapter Leader for OWASP Foundation
SQL and Relational Databases 101 - IBM (Big Data University)

projects.title: Adi Voice Project
projects.description: A dedicated speech corpus collection platform designed for the Adi Voice Project. This full-stack web application natively collects, aggregates, and reviews localized speech datasets.

projects.title: AuthHub
projects.description: GitHub-powered portfolio dashboard with OAuth login, repository analytics, pinned projects, and automated PDF export built using the modern Next.js stack.

projects.title: ClipNinja
projects.description: A modern web application designed to extract, trim, preview, and download YouTube video segments in seconds using a beautiful, responsive UI.

projects.title: Decentralized Storage System
projects.description: An alternative to cloud platforms like Google Drive leveraging the InterPlanetary File System (IPFS) and blockchain technology for enhanced data security.

projects.title: SpeedPulse
projects.description: Modern internet speed testing with beautiful visualizations and detailed analytics.

projects.title: ADTU Confessions
projects.description: An anonymous platform for Assam Down Town University students to share thoughts, stories, and experiences in a fun, safe, and engaging way.

projects.title: RGU Library Card Generator
projects.description: A digital library membership card generator system for Rajiv Gandhi University students.

projects.title: Subz (Subdomain Enumeration)
projects.description: A powerful command-line tool written in Bash for collecting subdomains of a given domain and analyzing potential security threats.
